becomeGuide.title: Become a Local Guide at AKMLEVA
becomeGuide.description: Share your passion for your city, showcase its best, and earn extra income doing what you love.

feature1.title: Total Flexibility
feature1.desc: Set your own schedule and availability. Work when and how you want.

feature2.title: Extra Income
feature2.desc: Turn your local knowledge into a reliable and rewarding source of income.

feature3.title: Global Community
feature3.desc: Join a network of passionate guides and connect with travelers from all over the world.

detailsPanel.noTours: This guide has not added any tours yet.

guide_1.bio: Carlos is an art historian who turns every street in Lisbon into an open-air gallery. His tours are a journey through time.
guide_1.tagline: Unveiling history on every corner of Lisbon.
guide_1.tour_title: Historic Lisbon: From the Castle to Belém
guide_1.tour_desc: A 4-hour walk through the most significant moments of Portugal's history, visiting iconic monuments.

guidesList.title: Available Guides
guidesList.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your filters or clearing the search to see all our fantastic guides.

hero.title: Meet Our Local Guides
hero.subtitle: Passionate travelers who turn your destination into an authentic experience.

emptyState.title: No guides match your criteria
emptyState.description: Try removing filters or searching for another term.

cta.title: Ready for your next story?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of travelers who discovered the hidden side of their favorite destinations.
